⊢ IndepFun (rewardByCount a (n + 1)) (fun ω i => rewardByCount a (↑i) ω) (Bandit.measure alg✝ ν✝)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
  -- `rewardByCount a (n+1)` depends on the first time the pull count of `a` reaches `n+1`,
  -- hence on a reward at some time `t`, while `fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount a i` only depends
  -- on rewards at times strictly before `t`. Those are independent under the product structure.
  -- We use the iid structure of the stream and the fact that these are measurable functions of
  -- disjoint coordinates.
  simpa [indepFun_iff_measure_preimage_inter_preimage_eq_mul] using
    (indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a n)
